name: Cream of Pecan Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in flour and broth (or water). Cook for 2-3 minutes to remove any raw flour taste.
4. Add seasonings, pecans, and celery leaves. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in cream and simmer for an additional 5 minutes until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and stir in mint sprigs.
7. Serve hot.
